hero.titleAccent: build the talent bench from within
hero.subtitle: We boost performance and loyalty of every employee. Close key positions with your own talent instead of expensive external hires.

pains.title: What the platform delivers for your HR function
pains.subtitle: Six areas where the platform absorbs routine work and gives HRD numbers they can actually steer with.

retain.solution: Digital passport + analytics surface attrition risks before resignation letters land

assess.solution: An AI assistant runs interviews on your scenarios and produces a comparable profile in 25 minutes

grow.pain: Give employees a clear growth path
grow.solution: Career tracks with stages, tests and reviews — from junior to manager

motivate.solution: Internal currency, rewards and a corporate shop instead of one-off bonuses

onboard.solution: Bulk XLSX import, auto-assign positions by email domain and tracks by role

decide.solution: Live dashboards for competencies, role readiness and hiring dynamics — one-click export

features.title: Six tools that work as one product
features.subtitle: Click any capability to see how it works.

stories.title: Stories you'll recognize yourself in

stories.wantSame: I want the same — request a demo

hrd.before: Excel instead of a system, a week to build a board report, 28% attrition.
hrd.after: Live analytics, reports in 5 minutes, attrition down to 17% and a 3-year succession plan.

manager.persona: Elena, HR partner at an IT company
manager.before: Manual onboarding for every hire, quarterly review interviews eat a full week.
manager.after: Bulk import, AI assessments, tracks auto-assigned. 60% of her time freed up.

lead.before: Has no idea who on the team is ready for promotion. Coaches by intuition.
lead.after: Sees progress for everyone, reviews stages in one click, builds team development plans.

finalCta.title: Every employee grows — the company grows with them
finalCta.subtitle: A 30-minute call: we'll show how to close key positions internally and keep your top performers.

faq.title: HRD frequently asked questions
faq.ask: Still have questions — ask on the demo call

items.a: From 30 minutes to 1 day. The onboarding wizard walks through positions, tests, tracks and invitations. Bulk employee import via XLSX/CSV.

items.q: Do we need integration with our HRIS?
items.a: We support org-structure import from XLSX/CSV/JSON and AI parsing of DOCX/PDF. Deep HRIS integration is available on request.
Multi-tenant architecture with database-level RLS: company data is fully isolated. Region-specific hosting can be discussed separately.

items.q: Can we upload our own assessment scenarios?
items.a: Yes. Upload a DOCX/PDF — the AI parses it into a scenario you can then edit visually.

items.q: Is it suitable for small business?
items.a: Yes, from 10 employees. Pricing scales with headcount. Get in touch and we'll quote for you.

ai-assessment.title: AI competency assessment
ai-assessment.tagline: An AI dialogue replaces 4 hours of interviews.

story.persona: Natalia, HRD at a manufacturing company
story.pain: Semi-annual reviews eat a full week, and results are subjective.
story.solution: An AI assistant runs a structured dialogue with every employee and produces a competency profile.
story.result: Objective scoring on 12 competencies in 25 minutes instead of 4 hours.

ai-assessment.hero: Replace subjective interviews with structured AI dialogue based on your assessment scenarios.

sections.heading: How it works
sections.body: Upload your assessment scenario (DOCX/PDF) or use a template. The AI runs the dialogue, captures answers and scores competencies with rationale.

sections.heading: What HRD gets
sections.body: A ready report per employee and roll-up analytics for the whole company.
bullets: Comparison to the reference role profile

hrdValue: 30+ hours saved per quarter on assessment interviews

career-tracks.title: Career tracks
career-tracks.tagline: From junior to manager — step by step.

story.persona: Elena, HR partner at an IT company
story.pain: Employees don't know what it takes to get promoted and leave for competitors.
story.solution: Track templates with stages, tests and HRD reviews auto-assigned by role.
story.result: Attrition down 24% in six months, a clear path for everyone.

career-tracks.hero: Design reference growth paths and auto-assign them to employees by role.

sections.heading: Track builder
sections.body: Build track templates from stages: task, test, file uploads, manager review.

sections.heading: Assignment and control
sections.body: Tracks are auto-assigned when an employee is created. HRD sees real-time progress for every stage.

hrdValue: Employees see a clear growth path

gamification.title: Gamification & currency

story.pain: Bonus budget is limited and engagement is dropping.
story.solution: Employees earn internal currency for progress and spend it in the corporate shop.

gamification.hero: A flexible system of points, achievements and internal currency for non-cash motivation.

sections.heading: Rewards under your rules
sections.body: Configure triggers and reward amounts: completed stage, passed test, work anniversary.

sections.heading: Corporate shop
sections.body: Employees spend currency on merch, days off, learning and perks. HRD approves orders.

analytics.title: HRD analytics
analytics.tagline: Metrics you can take to the CEO.

story.pain: Every board report takes a week in Excel.
story.solution: Live dashboards for competencies, role readiness and hiring dynamics.
story.result: Board report in 5 minutes instead of 5 days.

analytics.hero: Live Recharts dashboards: scoring trends, role readiness, track progress.

sections.heading: What's inside
sections.body: All key metrics in one place, export to XLSX/PDF.

hrdValue: Numbers to defend the HR budget

digital-passport.title: Digital passport
digital-passport.tagline: An employee's full history in one profile.

story.pain: Resumes, assessments, tests — scattered across files and systems.
story.solution: A single employee passport: skills, role history, assessments, achievements.
story.result: Internal hires closed in 2 days instead of 2 weeks.

digital-passport.hero: 360° employee profile: skills, experience, assessments, tracks and achievements in one place.

sections.heading: Collected automatically
sections.body: The passport updates automatically with no manual entry.
bullets: Tests passed broken down by competency

story.pain: Every new hire takes an hour of manual access and track setup.
story.solution: Bulk XLSX import with auto-assignment of positions by email domain and tracks by role.
story.result: Onboarding 200 employees in an hour instead of two weeks.

onboarding.hero: Bulk employee import, auto-assignment of positions and tracks, company launch wizard.

sections.heading: Company onboarding wizard
sections.body: A step-by-step checklist: positions → tests → tracks → shop → invitations. With a progress bar.

sections.heading: Bulk import
sections.body: Employees just sign in with their email — the profile is already configured.
